title: TheNorthWild: Hunt
description: TheNorthWild: Hunt adds a variety of creatures to the world, predators and prey alike.
body:
# TheNorthWild: Hunt

**TheNorthWild: Hunt** adds new wildlife, materials, and equipment to Minecraft with a focus on survival and realism. It is the first part of the TheNorthWild mod series.

## Creatures

Hunt and encounter new animals that provide unique drops used in crafting gear and tools:

### Timber Wolves

![wolfrun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65ec589c15fdc7bb47a26431892077e923627504_0.webp)
![wolves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d4037d8a622cb6198dba8b9f4d4a20bd8c5f5bb_0.webp)
![wolfhowl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef37d41801e25cd5bb043ee72f4eae2ed39cf10e_0.webp)

### Grizzly Bears
![bear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/206a3e87474e70474629de6361c4469224586b73_0.webp)
![bearaggro](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8396d820f750e2d0d9e18b69fa9f6ccbca1f9696_0.webp)
![bearrun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/304ad17a40baf9c0a76a6e2c59beee9b4a30ed5d_0.webp)

### Moose
![moose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2dd295c7fe894700d72512b097534226e3921098_0.webp)

### Deer
![deer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28f253a3b63c84610dad27e20dde2a88a7b2de49_0.webp)

### Squirrels
![squirrel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3f04bd99a038b2313f71b0986b0cbb32e9e3da3_0.webp)

### Owls
![owl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e5efc448cc610b2528542beb39dddc19243c6e9_0.webp)

(more creatures planned in future updates)

## Equipment and Crafting

## Armor Sets

 Wolfskin Armor
 
 Bearskin Armor

 Moosehide Armor
 
 Deerskin Armor



## Weapons

 Wolf Fang Spear

 Bear Claw Dagger

![armorandweapon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99c89def48161b66de890cb0d70fe2cbd958cac9_0.webp)

## Accessories

### Wolf Fang Necklace (rare drop from timber wolves)
![wolfnecklace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f5815e007b6a879a6b6cfcd804b0e4fcdaacd6d_0.webp)

### Backpacks

Each backpack type provides unique survival perks.

Wolfskin Backpack: Timberwolves ignore the wearer during the day.

Bearskin Backpack: Reduces damage taken from behind.

Moosehide Backpack: Grants knockback resistance.

Deerskin Backpack: Increases sprint mobility.

Squirrel Pouch: Ultralight, no stamina penalty.

Backpacks can also be placed in the world on the ground, hung on walls, or attached to ceilings, with their storage preserved when picked back up.
![backpacks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bf97f91e4a095baea342212e625afedd0389ff3_0.webp)

### Cloaks made from Wolf, Bear, Moose, and Deer hides
![cloaks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f6af7a9e69fcd3657271a1908f9b449bc415ec6_0.webp)

### Snowshoes for easier travel in snow
![snowshoes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0df9901b2bce7f10ab645e93ee2770e3ad55871_0.webp)

Shelter

Tents made from Leather, Deer, Wolf, Moose, and Bear hides

All tents are dyeable

Provide protection from rain

Offer insulation against heat and cold depending on the material
![tents](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/589dc1262153d4be62413263bc387faf7303c95c_0.webp)
![tents dyed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e80f1e290489d1e5a215361db9ccc7365c8e37a_0.webp)

All equipment is crafted from materials dropped by the creatures themselves.

### Immersive Tooltips (toggleable):
Adds lore-style descriptions to most vanilla and mods items, from gear and tools to food and resources.

### Mod Integration

Cold Sweat:
Pelts and hides provide realistic insulation against cold environments.

Curios (required):
Needed to equip accessories such as necklaces and backpacks.



## Requirements
### 
### GeckoLib
### 
### Curios
